en: The LORD spoke to Moses and Aaron, saying,
zh: 耶和華對摩西和亞倫說：

en: "When a person has on the skin of his body a swelling or an eruption or a spot, and it turns into a case of leprous disease on the skin of his body, then he shall be brought to Aaron the priest or to one of his sons the priests,
zh: “如果有人在皮肉上生了瘤，或癬，或火斑，後來皮肉變成了大痲風病症 ，就要把他帶到一個作祭司的亞倫子孫那裡。

en: and the priest shall examine the diseased area on the skin of his body. And if the hair in the diseased area has turned white and the disease appears to be deeper than the skin of his body, it is a case of leprous disease. When the priest has examined him, he shall pronounce him unclean.
zh: 祭司要察看皮肉上的病症；如果患處的毛已經變白 ，病症的現象又深透皮下的肉，就是大痲風病症，祭司發現這樣，就要宣布他為不潔淨。

en: But if the spot is white in the skin of his body and appears no deeper than the skin, and the hair in it has not turned white, the priest shall shut up the diseased person for seven days.
zh: 火斑若是在他的皮肉上發白，但沒有深透皮膚的現象，上面的毛也沒有變白，祭司就要把患者隔離七天。

en: And the priest shall examine him on the seventh day, and if in his eyes the disease is checked and the disease has not spread in the skin, then the priest shall shut him up for another seven days.
zh: 到了第七天，祭司要察看他，如果看見病情止住了，皮上的患處沒有蔓延，祭司還要把他再隔離七天。

en: And the priest shall examine him again on the seventh day, and if the diseased area has faded and the disease has not spread in the skin, then the priest shall pronounce him clean; it is only an eruption. And he shall wash his clothes and be clean.
zh: 到了第七天，祭司要再察看他；如果看見患處色澤變淡，也沒有在皮上蔓延，祭司就要宣布他為潔淨，這不過是癬；他洗淨衣服，就得潔淨了。

en: But if the eruption spreads in the skin, after he has shown himself to the priest for his cleansing, he shall appear again before the priest.
zh: 但是祭司察看，宣布他潔淨以後，癬若是在皮上蔓延，他就要再次給祭司察看。

en: And the priest shall look, and if the eruption has spread in the skin, then the priest shall pronounce him unclean; it is a leprous disease.
zh: 祭司要察看他；如果發現癬在皮上蔓延了，祭司就要宣布他為不潔淨；這是大痲風。

en: "When a man is afflicted with a leprous disease, he shall be brought to the priest,
zh: “如果有人感染到大痲風，就要帶他到祭司那裡。

en: and the priest shall look. And if there is a white swelling in the skin that has turned the hair white, and there is raw flesh in the swelling,
zh: 祭司要察看，如果發現皮上有白色浮腫，毛已經變白，患處的肉紅腫，

en: it is a chronic leprous disease in the skin of his body, and the priest shall pronounce him unclean. He shall not shut him up, for he is unclean.
zh: 這就是皮肉上的潛伏性痲風病發作，祭司要宣布他為不潔淨；不必隔離觀察，因為他已經不潔淨。

en: And if the leprous disease breaks out in the skin, so that the leprous disease covers all the skin of the diseased person from head to foot, so far as the priest can see,
zh: 如果祭司認為痲風病已在皮上蔓延，從頭到腳遮滿了患病者全身的皮，

en: then the priest shall look, and if the leprous disease has covered all his body, he shall pronounce him clean of the disease; it has all turned white, and he is clean.
zh: 那麼祭司就要察看；如果看見痲風布滿了他的全身，祭司就要宣布那患病者為潔淨；因為全身變白，就算是潔淨。

en: But when raw flesh appears on him, he shall be unclean.
zh: 但他身上甚麼時候出現紅腫的肉，他就成為不潔淨。

en: And the priest shall examine the raw flesh and pronounce him unclean. Raw flesh is unclean, for it is a leprous disease.
zh: 祭司發現那紅腫的肉，就要宣布他為不潔淨；紅腫的肉原來是不潔淨的，是痲風病。

en: But if the raw flesh recovers and turns white again, then he shall come to the priest,
zh: 但紅腫的肉若是再復原，又變成白，他就要到祭司那裡，

en: and the priest shall examine him, and if the disease has turned white, then the priest shall pronounce the diseased person clean; he is clean.
zh: 祭司要察看；如果看見患處變白了，祭司就要宣布那患病者為潔淨的；他就潔淨了。

en: "If there is in the skin of one's body a boil and it heals,
zh: “人若是在皮肉上生了瘡，已經醫好了；

en: and in the place of the boil there comes a white swelling or a reddish-white spot, then it shall be shown to the priest.
zh: 但在長瘡之處又起了白色浮腫，或是白中帶紅的火斑，他就要給祭司察看。

en: And the priest shall look, and if it appears deeper than the skin and its hair has turned white, then the priest shall pronounce him unclean. It is a case of leprous disease that has broken out in the boil.
zh: 祭司要察看；如果發現有深透皮膚的現象，上面的毛也變白了，祭司就要宣布他為不潔淨；這就是在瘡中發作出來的痲風病。

en: But if the priest examines it and there is no white hair in it and it is not deeper than the skin, but has faded, then the priest shall shut him up seven days.
zh: 但如果祭司察看病情，看見上面沒有白毛，也沒有深透皮膚，只是發暗而已，祭司就要把他隔離七天；

en: And if it spreads in the skin, then the priest shall pronounce him unclean; it is a disease.
zh: 如果在皮膚上蔓延，祭司就要宣布他為不潔淨；這就是痲風病。

en: But if the spot remains in one place and does not spread, it is the scar of the boil, and the priest shall pronounce him clean.
zh: 火斑若是在原處止住，沒有蔓延，就是瘡的疤痕，祭司就要宣布他為潔淨。

en: "Or, when the body has a burn on its skin and the raw flesh of the burn becomes a spot, reddish-white or white,
zh: “如果人的皮肉發炎，發炎紅腫的肉成了火斑，白中帶紅，或是純白，

en: the priest shall examine it, and if the hair in the spot has turned white and it appears deeper than the skin, then it is a leprous disease. It has broken out in the burn, and the priest shall pronounce him unclean; it is a case of leprous disease.
zh: 祭司就要察看病情；如果發現火斑中的毛變白了，又有深透皮膚的現象，這就是從發炎發作出來的痲風病。祭司就要宣布他為不潔淨；這是痲風病。

en: But if the priest examines it and there is no white hair in the spot and it is no deeper than the skin, but has faded, the priest shall shut him up seven days,
zh: 但如果祭司察看病情，看見火斑中沒有白毛，也沒有深透皮膚，只是發暗而已，祭司就要把他隔離七天。

en: and the priest shall examine him the seventh day. If it is spreading in the skin, then the priest shall pronounce him unclean; it is a case of leprous disease.
zh: 到了第七天，祭司要察看；火斑若是在皮上蔓延，祭司就要宣布他為不潔淨，這是痲風病。

en: But if the spot remains in one place and does not spread in the skin, but has faded, it is a swelling from the burn, and the priest shall pronounce him clean, for it is the scar of the burn.
zh: 火斑若是在原處止住，沒有在皮上蔓延，只是發暗而已，這是發炎腫瘤，祭司就要宣布他為潔淨，因為這只是發炎的疤痕。

en: "When a man or woman has a disease on the head or the beard,
zh: “無論男女，如果在頭上或是鬍鬚上受到感染，

en: the priest shall examine the disease. And if it appears deeper than the skin, and the hair in it is yellow and thin, then the priest shall pronounce him unclean. It is an itch, a leprous disease of the head or the beard.
zh: 祭司要察看那病；如果發現有深透皮膚的現象，而且還有黃色細毛，祭司就要宣布他為不潔淨，這是癩痢，是頭上或是鬍鬚上的痲風病。

en: And if the priest examines the itching disease and it appears no deeper than the skin and there is no black hair in it, then the priest shall shut up the person with the itching disease for seven days,
zh: 祭司察看癩痢的患處；如果看見沒有深透皮膚的現象，那裡也沒有黑毛，祭司就要把那患癩痢的人隔離七天。

en: and on the seventh day the priest shall examine the disease. If the itch has not spread, and there is in it no yellow hair, and the itch appears to be no deeper than the skin,
zh: 到了第七天，祭司要察看患處；如果看見癩痢沒有蔓延，那裡也沒有黃毛，癩痢也沒有深透皮膚的現象，

en: then he shall shave himself, but the itch he shall not shave; and the priest shall shut up the person with the itching disease for another seven days.
zh: 那人就要剃去鬚髮，患癩痢的地方卻不可剃；祭司要把那患癩痢的人再隔離七天。

en: And on the seventh day the priest shall examine the itch, and if the itch has not spread in the skin and it appears to be no deeper than the skin, then the priest shall pronounce him clean. And he shall wash his clothes and be clean.
zh: 到了第七天，祭司要再察看那癩痢；如果看見癩痢在皮上沒有蔓延，也沒有深透皮膚的現象，祭司就要宣布他為潔淨；他洗淨衣服，就潔淨了。

en: But if the itch spreads in the skin after his cleansing,
zh: 但是他得潔淨以後，癩痢若是在皮上蔓延，

en: then the priest shall examine him, and if the itch has spread in the skin, the priest need not seek for the yellow hair; he is unclean.
zh: 祭司就要察看；如果發現癩痢在皮上蔓延，祭司不必找黃毛，他已經不潔淨。

en: But if in his eyes the itch is unchanged and black hair has grown in it, the itch is healed and he is clean, and the priest shall pronounce him clean.
zh: 如果祭司認為，癩痢已經止住，那裡也長了黑毛；癩痢已經痊愈，那人就潔淨了，祭司要宣布他為潔淨。

en: "When a man or a woman has spots on the skin of the body, white spots,
zh: “無論男女，皮肉上若是起了斑點，白色的斑點，

en: the priest shall look, and if the spots on the skin of the body are of a dull white, it is leukoderma that has broken out in the skin; he is clean.
zh: 祭司就要察看；如果發現斑點在皮肉上呈灰白色，這是皮膚出疹，那人是潔淨的。

en: "If a man's hair falls out from his head, he is bald; he is clean.
zh: “人的頭髮若是掉下了，只不過是禿頭，還是潔淨的。

en: And if a man's hair falls out from his forehead, he has baldness of the forehead; he is clean.
zh: 人的頭頂上若是掉下了頭髮，只不過是禿額，他還是潔淨的。

en: But if there is on the bald head or the bald forehead a reddish-white diseased area, it is a leprous disease breaking out on his bald head or his bald forehead.
zh: 但是頭頂禿處或是額前禿處，若有白中帶紅的病症，這就是痲風病，在他的頭頂禿處或是額前處發作。

en: Then the priest shall examine him, and if the diseased swelling is reddish-white on his bald head or on his bald forehead, like the appearance of leprous disease in the skin of the body,
zh: 祭司就要察看，如果發現在他頭頂禿處或是額前禿處，有白中帶紅的浮腫病症，像皮肉上痲風病的現象，

en: he is a leprous man, he is unclean. The priest must pronounce him unclean; his disease is on his head.
zh: 那人就是患了痲風病，就不潔淨；祭司要宣布他為不潔淨，那人頭上染了痲風。

en: "The leprous person who has the disease shall wear torn clothes and let the hair of his head hang loose, and he shall cover his upper lip and cry out, 'Unclean, unclean.'
zh: “身上患有痲風病的人，要撕裂自己的衣服，披頭散髮，遮蓋上唇喊叫：‘不潔淨！不潔淨！’

en: He shall remain unclean as long as he has the disease. He is unclean. He shall live alone. His dwelling shall be outside the camp.
zh: 在他患病的日子裡，他是不潔淨的；他既然不潔淨，就要獨居，住在營外。

en: "When there is a case of leprous disease in a garment, whether a woolen or a linen garment,
zh: “染了痲風病的衣服，無論是羊毛衣服或是麻布衣服；

en: in warp or woof of linen or wool, or in a skin or in anything made of skin,
zh: 不論是編結的或是紡織的；是麻布的或是羊毛的；是皮子或是皮子做成的任何物件；

en: if the disease is greenish or reddish in the garment, or in the skin or in the warp or the woof or in any article made of skin, it is a case of leprous disease, and it shall be shown to the priest.
zh: 病症若是在衣服或皮子、編結物或紡織物，或任何皮子做成的器具上發綠或發紅，那就是發霉 的現象，要給祭司察看。

en: And the priest shall examine the disease and shut up that which has the disease for seven days.
zh: 祭司要察看那現象，把染了病症之物隔離七天。

en: Then he shall examine the disease on the seventh day. If the disease has spread in the garment, in the warp or the woof, or in the skin, whatever be the use of the skin, the disease is a persistent leprous disease; it is unclean.
zh: 到了第七天，祭司要察看那病症；如果那病症在衣服、編結物、紡織物、皮子，或是任何皮子做成的物件上蔓延，這就是頑惡的霉，那件物件就不潔淨了。

en: And he shall burn the garment, or the warp or the woof, the wool or the linen, or any article made of skin that is diseased, for it is a persistent leprous disease. It shall be burned in the fire.
zh: 染上病症的衣服，無論是編結的或是紡織的，是羊毛或是麻布，或任何皮子做的物件，都要燒掉。因為那是頑惡的霉，所以要用火燒掉。

en: "And if the priest examines, and if the disease has not spread in the garment, in the warp or the woof or in any article made of skin,
zh: “但如果祭司察看病症，在衣服、編結物、紡織物，或是皮子做的任何物件上，沒有蔓延，

en: then the priest shall command that they wash the thing in which is the disease, and he shall shut it up for another seven days.
zh: 祭司就要吩咐人把它洗淨，然後再隔離七天。

en: And the priest shall examine the diseased thing after it has been washed. And if the appearance of the diseased area has not changed, though the disease has not spread, it is unclean. You shall burn it in the fire, whether the rot is on the back or on the front.
zh: 洗淨以後，祭司要察看；如果看見那病症沒有轉變，雖然沒有蔓延，那物件仍是不潔淨；要用火把它燒掉，因為裡外都腐蝕了。

en: "But if the priest examines, and if the diseased area has faded after it has been washed, he shall tear it out of the garment or the skin or the warp or the woof.
zh: “但如果祭司察看的時候，看見它洗淨以後，色澤暗淡了，就要把那部分從衣服或是皮子、編結物或紡織物上撕下來。

en: Then if it appears again in the garment, in the warp or the woof, or in any article made of skin, it is spreading. You shall burn with fire whatever has the disease.
zh: 如果病症再出現在剩下的衣服、編結物、紡織物或任何皮子做的物件上，那就是病症仍然發作，染了病症的物件，要用火燒掉。

en: But the garment, or the warp or the woof, or any article made of skin from which the disease departs when you have washed it, shall then be washed a second time, and be clean."
zh: 如果病症離開了，經過洗淨，剩下的衣服，無論編結的或是紡織的，或任何皮子做的物件，只要再洗一次，就潔淨了。”

en: This is the law for a case of leprous disease in a garment of wool or linen, either in the warp or the woof, or in any article made of skin, to determine whether it is clean or unclean.
zh: 以上是與羊毛衣服或是麻布衣服、編結的或紡織的或任何皮子做的物件有關的發霉律例，可以斷定潔淨，或是不潔淨。
